records.ety: [OE. successour, OF. successur, successor, F. successeur, L. successor. See Succeed.]

defs: One who succeeds or follows; one who takes the place which another has left, and sustains the like part or character; -- correlative to predecessor; as, the successor of a deceased king.
quotes: A gift to a corporation, either of lands or of chattels, without naming their successors, vests an absolute property in them so lond as the corporation subsists.
